title: poa pitardiana
intro: Poa pitardiana, also known as Pitard's Meadow-grass, is a species of grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Poa pitardiana include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and is also used in the production of herbal tinctures and extracts.
